name: Peanut Crispies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt shortening and butter over very low heat.
2. Remove from heat and stir in sugar.
3. Add egg and vanilla; beat well.
4. Combine flour, soda, baking powder, and salt; sift into sugar mixture and mix well.
5. Blend in oats, corn flakes, and peanuts.
6. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
7. Place the balls 2 inches apart on a greased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 12 to 15 minutes.
Makes 4 dozen 1-inch cookies.
